summary: CRM Leads page and Login improvements - All features verified. Login page has country selection dropdown (India, Malaysia, Thailand, Philippines). Leads page has action-oriented summary cards (New Leads Today, RCB WhatsApp, Follow Up, Payment Link Sent) with clickable filtering. Payment Link column shows View/Copy buttons when link exists. Ad ID displays below Source. Table has reduced padding for wider display.
passed_tests: Login page shows Country selection dropdown before email/password
Country dropdown shows India, Malaysia, Thailand, Philippines
Login works after selecting country (tested with India)
Leads page summary cards show: New Leads (Today), RCB WhatsApp, Follow Up, Payment Link Sent
Clicking on summary cards filters the table
Filter badge appears showing active filter (e.g., 'Filtered: payment sent')
Leads table has reduced left/right padding (p-4 = 16px)
Payment Link column shows Send/Resend button
When payment link exists, View and Copy buttons appear below Send
Ad ID field present in Edit Lead modal
Source column displays Ad ID below source name when present (e.g., 'Ad: 120216941809833')
Backend API supports ad_id field in leads
Backend API supports payment_link field in leads
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login page now has country selection dropdown at top of form. Countries API (/api/auth/countries) is public and returns India, Malaysia, Thailand, Philippines. Leads page has 4 action-oriented summary cards that filter the table when clicked. Payment Link column shows View/Copy buttons for leads with existing payment links. Ad ID displays below Source in the table. Table has reduced padding (p-4) for wider display. All backend APIs working correctly including ad_id and payment_link fields on leads.
